title: ChatStreamEnable serializes None fields as null instead of absent
description: Trigger: calling serde_json::to_string on ChatStreamEnable with chat_ids: None or contact_ids: None. Bad behavior: output contains 'chatIds: null, contactIds: null' instead of omitting the fields. Spec says absent = all member chats/contacts; null is not defined and may be rejected or misinterpreted by servers. Fix: add #[serde(skip_serializing_if = 'Option::is_none')] to chat_ids and contact_ids fields on ChatStreamEnable.
close_reason: Added #[serde(skip_serializing_if = 'Option::is_none')] to chat_ids and contact_ids on ChatStreamEnable. Added serialization test asserting keys are absent when None.
